chunks.text: On a rainy afternoon, I was alone at home.
Outside, the sky was a little dark, and inside, the house was calm.
I felt a little afraid, but I took a quiet, deep breath.
At first, I was bored, so I opened a book.
As I turned the pages, I became curious about a story of a far town.
The main character was so brave that my heart grew warm.
After a while, I heard the sound of thunder from far away.
For a moment, the sky looked angry.
The trees outside shook, and the silence of being alone felt even stronger.
To my surprise, the rain stopped by evening
and a rainbow appeared in the western sky.
I ran outside and laughed alone.
After the rain, the world seemed to breathe peacefully.
I wanted to hold this glad feeling quietly in my heart.
At night, when I told everyone about it, my sister cried a little with joy.
“ I wanted to see that rainbow too!
